caption: A man with short dark hair, wearing a blue button-down shirt with an "INFOOBJECTS" logo on the chest, is being interviewed in a studio. He wears a small headset microphone and is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring the logos "theCUBE" and "siliconANGLE". He is seated at a dark table with a closed black notebook resting in front of him. As he speaks, he shifts his facial expressions and gaze. A blue graphic overlay appears and then disappears, displaying the text "RISHI YADAV | @meditativesoul", "CEO", and "infoobjects" alongside a blue 3D cube icon. In the bottom left corner of the final frames, a small logo reads "#BigDataSV 2015". The scene remains static in terms of camera angle and location, focusing on the man's upper body as he engages in the conversation.
